subcodes.first_line: O blessed souls! Should ye in every breath open a hundred tongues, and with each tongue utter a thousand words [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مبارکه اگر در هر دمی صد زبان بگشااید و بهر زبان هزاران نطق نمااید که
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @spiritual transformation, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
